## How to test

<!-- Commands and / or steps a reviewer can run to verify the change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests where applicable
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No tokens, secrets, or production hostnames committed

## Type of change

- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (patch)
- [ ] `feat` — new feature (minor)
- [ ] `feat!` or `BREAKING CHANGE` — backwards-incompatible (major)
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `test` / `refactor` — no version bump
